title: MailerLite vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: MailerLite vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between MailerLite and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses And Freelancers On A Budget
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses and freelancers on a budget
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite wins for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Customer.io?
faq.a: MailerLite starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
